Uses of Class
com.github.robtimus.obfuscation.jackson.databind.ObfuscationModule.Builder

  • Uses of ObfuscationModule.Builder in com.github.robtimus.obfuscation.jackson.databind

    Methods in com.github.robtimus.obfuscation.jackson.databind that return ObfuscationModule.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ObfuscationModule.Builder
    ObfuscationModule.builder()
    Returns a builder that will create ObfuscatedModules.
    ObfuscationModule.Builder
    ObfuscationModule.Builder.requireObfuscatorAnnotation(boolean requireObfuscatorAnnotation)
    Sets whether or not to require an annotation to provide an obfuscator for List, Set, Collection and Map fields.
    ObfuscationModule.Builder
    ObfuscationModule.Builder.withDefaultCharacterRepresentation(Class<?> type, CharacterRepresentationProvider defaultProvider)
    Sets the default character representation provider to use for a specific type, in case no character representation provider could be found from annotations.
    ObfuscationModule.Builder
    ObfuscationModule.Builder.withDefaultObfuscator(Obfuscator defaultObfuscator)
    Sets the default obfuscator to use, in case no obfuscator could be found from annotations.
    ObfuscationModule.Builder
    ObfuscationModule.Builder.withDefaultObfuscator(Class<?> type, Obfuscator defaultObfuscator)
    Sets the default obfuscator to use for a specific type, in case no obfuscator could be found from annotations.
    ObfuscationModule.Builder
    ObfuscationModule.Builder.withObjectFactory(ObjectFactory objectFactory)
    Sets the object factory to use.
